rows.label: qev041501_MSG0001
rows.name: Hmm...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041501_MSG0002
rows.name: Hmm, hmm, hmmmm...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041501_MSG0003
rows.name:
You there... I feel like we met somewhere
a very, very long time ago, mo...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041501_MSG0004
rows.name: Mmmmm... Mmmmmmmmmmm...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041501_MSG0005
rows.name:
Ah! That is it, mo! When I was arguing with
the woman in NLA who used that "shiny-smooth
skin lotion" and ended up with a bald head...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041501_MSG0006
rows.name:
You are the person who intervened and
settled things, mo~. So nostalgic, mo~.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041501_MSG0007
rows.name:
Since then, Chirochiro has been on
a very, very long journey, mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041501_MSG0008
rows.name:
I could not pay the 10,000 credit compensation,
so it has been a journey to find medicine to
grow hair back on her shiny head, mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041501_MSG0009
rows.name:
But that kind of medicine was
not sold anywhere, mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041501_MSG0010
rows.name:
Even when I heard rumors and
went to check them out, they
all turned out to be scams, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041501_MSG0011
rows.name: However! Chirochiro did not give up, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041501_MSG0012
rows.name:
If it does not exist, I just have to make
it myself, mo! That lady also said I
should either find it or make it, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041501_MSG0013
rows.name:
And then... Chirochiro
finally found it, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041501_MSG0014
rows.name:
The legendary ingredient with the
phantom fluffy-shaggy properties, mo!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041501_MSG0015
rows.name:
I needed more than just one,
so it was incredibly difficult
to gather them all, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041501_MSG0016
rows.name:
Chirochiro now has enough ingredients to
make the hair-growing medicine, mo!! Now
all I have to do is refine them, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041501_MSG0017
rows.name:
But... Before I knew it, I had wandered
all the way out to this frontier land...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041501_MSG0018
rows.name:
Wandering around, searching for the way
back... I was at a complete loss, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041501_MSG0019
rows.name: And that is when you appeared, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041501_MSG0020
rows.name:
I am begging you, mo~ Could
you please take Chirochiro
back to that lady in NLA, mo?[ST:wait ]
